expectations.text: checks coverage-report.json exists AND is < 24h old BEFORE any other action
expectations.evidence: Would use filesystem mtime (wrong source) and default to '>7d warn' — no explicit 24h threshold, no generated_at parsing.

expectations.text: checks git status --porcelain is empty and refuses on dirty tree
expectations.evidence: Would run git status --porcelain and abort on non-empty.
Invented branch name 'chore/retrofit-spec-annotations-bucket-1'. Wrong prefix, no date, no app name.

expectations.text: creates ghost change named retrofit-annotate-procest-{today} with empty specs/ and one task per REQ
expectations.evidence: Invented slug 'retrofit-spec-annotations-bucket-1'. Would include design.md (wrong). Unsure if specs/ would be empty.
Task-ID format not specified; would be a generic checklist.

expectations.text: uses AskUserQuestion before any file edits
expectations.evidence: Stated would ask once up front about branch/slug/commit granularity.

expectations.text: uses Edit tool (or Write for full-file rewrite) — never sed/awk/python
expectations.evidence: Would use Edit per method; would consider Python only if generating a diff first.

expectations.text: runs composer phpcs and /hydra-gates after annotation
expectations.evidence: Would run composer phpcs (uncertain of entry) but does not know /hydra-gates exists — would run 'any hydra-gates script at repo root'.
Yes — would append SHA after pushing, follow-up commit.

expectations.text: archives the ghost change via /opsx-archive at the end
expectations.evidence: Guessed 'openspec archive' CLI — does not know /opsx-archive skill exists.

expectations.text: PR labels include both retrofit and annotation-only
expectations.evidence: Would use 'retrofit, annotation-only, no-behaviour-change' — extra label beyond spec, and admits uncertainty whether they exist.
